create_rebalance_workflow.description: create rebalance workflow a rebalance workflow A
preconditions: I can only create rebalance workflow a rebalance workflow A if it is not the case that A is registered and it is not the case that workflow A is completed
effects: Once I create rebalance workflow a rebalance workflow A, it is the case that A is registered

assign_agent_to_workflow.description: assign a build agent B to a rebalance workflow A
preconditions: I can only assign a build agent B to a rebalance workflow A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available and A is compatible with B
I can only assign a build agent B to a rebalance workflow A if it is not the case that the workflow A has an allocation
effects: Once I assign a build agent B to a rebalance workflow A, it is the case that B is allocated to the workflow A and the workflow A has an allocation
Once I assign a build agent B to a rebalance workflow A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_agent_from_workflow.description: release a build agent B from a rebalance workflow A
preconditions: I can only release a build agent B from a rebalance workflow A if it is the case that B is allocated to the workflow A
I can only release a build agent B from a rebalance workflow A if it is not the case that the stage of the workflow A is locked and it is not the case that the workflow A is ready for finalization
effects: Once I release a build agent B from a rebalance workflow A, it is the case that B is available

Once I release a build agent B from a rebalance workflow A, it is not the case anymore that B is allocated to the workflow A and it is not the case anymore that the workflow A has an allocation and it is not the case anymore that the workflow A is prepared and it is not the case anymore that the workflow checks for A have passed and it is not the case anymore that workflow A requires manual approval and it is not the case anymore that workflow A is finalized and it is not the case anymore that A requires a quota adjustment

attach_agent_pool_to_workflow.description: attach an agent pool B to a rebalance workflow A
preconditions: I can only attach an agent pool B to a rebalance workflow A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available
effects: Once I attach an agent pool B to a rebalance workflow A, it is the case that A is bound to the agent pool B
Once I attach an agent pool B to a rebalance workflow A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

detach_agent_pool_from_workflow.description: detach an agent pool B from a rebalance workflow A
preconditions: I can only detach an agent pool B from a rebalance workflow A if it is the case that A is bound to the agent pool B
effects: Once I detach an agent pool B from a rebalance workflow A, it is the case that B is available
Once I detach an agent pool B from a rebalance workflow A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the agent pool B

reserve_pool_capacity_for_workflow.description: reserve pool capacity for a rebalance workflow A in an agent pool B
preconditions: I can only reserve pool capacity for a rebalance workflow A in an agent pool B if it is the case that A is registered and the workflow A has an allocation and A is bound to the agent pool B
I can only reserve pool capacity for a rebalance workflow A in an agent pool B if it is not the case that the workflow A is prepared
effects: Once I reserve pool capacity for a rebalance workflow A in an agent pool B, it is the case that the workflow A is prepared

apply_credential_token_to_workflow.description: apply a credential token B to a rebalance workflow A
preconditions: I can only apply a credential token B to a rebalance workflow A if it is the case that A is registered and the workflow A has an allocation and B is available
I can only apply a credential token B to a rebalance workflow A if it is not the case that the workflow A is prepared
effects: Once I apply a credential token B to a rebalance workflow A, it is the case that the workflow A is prepared and workflow A requires manual approval
Once I apply a credential token B to a rebalance workflow A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

approver_approve_pool_binding.description: approve pool binding for a rebalance workflow A with an agent pool B by an approver C
preconditions: I can only approve pool binding for a rebalance workflow A with an agent pool B by an approver C if it is the case that the workflow A is prepared and the workflow A has an allocation and A is bound to the agent pool B and C is available
I can only approve pool binding for a rebalance workflow A with an agent pool B by an approver C if it is not the case that the workflow checks for A have passed
effects: Once I approve pool binding for a rebalance workflow A with an agent pool B by an approver C, it is the case that the workflow checks for A have passed
Once I approve pool binding for a rebalance workflow A with an agent pool B by an approver C, it is not the case anymore that workflow A requires manual approval

approver_approve_artifact_binding.description: approve artifact binding for a rebalance workflow A with a build artifact B
preconditions: I can only approve artifact binding for a rebalance workflow A with a build artifact B if it is the case that the workflow A has an allocation and workflow A has approved build artifact B
I can only approve artifact binding for a rebalance workflow A with a build artifact B if it is not the case that the workflow checks for A have passed
effects: Once I approve artifact binding for a rebalance workflow A with a build artifact B, it is the case that the workflow checks for A have passed
Once I approve artifact binding for a rebalance workflow A with a build artifact B, it is not the case anymore that workflow A requires manual approval

bind_capacity_profile_to_workflow.description: bind a capacity profile B to a rebalance workflow A
preconditions: I can only bind a capacity profile B to a rebalance workflow A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I bind a capacity profile B to a rebalance workflow A, it is the case that the workflow A is bound to the capacity profile B
Once I bind a capacity profile B to a rebalance workflow A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unbind_capacity_profile_from_workflow.description: unbind a capacity profile B from a rebalance workflow A
preconditions: I can only unbind a capacity profile B from a rebalance workflow A if it is the case that the workflow A is bound to the capacity profile B
effects: Once I unbind a capacity profile B from a rebalance workflow A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unbind a capacity profile B from a rebalance workflow A, it is not the case anymore that the workflow A is bound to the capacity profile B

bind_security_control_to_workflow.description: bind a security control B to a rebalance workflow A
preconditions: I can only bind a security control B to a rebalance workflow A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I bind a security control B to a rebalance workflow A, it is the case that the workflow A is bound to the security control B
Once I bind a security control B to a rebalance workflow A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unbind_security_control_from_workflow.description: unbind a security control B from a rebalance workflow A
preconditions: I can only unbind a security control B from a rebalance workflow A if it is the case that the workflow A is bound to the security control B
effects: Once I unbind a security control B from a rebalance workflow A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unbind a security control B from a rebalance workflow A, it is not the case anymore that the workflow A is bound to the security control B

bind_node_group_to_workflow.description: bind a node group B to a rebalance workflow A
preconditions: I can only bind a node group B to a rebalance workflow A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I bind a node group B to a rebalance workflow A, it is the case that the workflow A is bound to the node group B
Once I bind a node group B to a rebalance workflow A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unbind_node_group_from_workflow.description: unbind a node group B from a rebalance workflow A
preconditions: I can only unbind a node group B from a rebalance workflow A if it is the case that the workflow A is bound to the node group B
effects: Once I unbind a node group B from a rebalance workflow A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unbind a node group B from a rebalance workflow A, it is not the case anymore that the workflow A is bound to the node group B

bind_capability_tag_to_workflow.description: bind a capability tag B to a rebalance workflow A
preconditions: I can only bind a capability tag B to a rebalance workflow A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available and A is compatible with B
effects: Once I bind a capability tag B to a rebalance workflow A, it is the case that the workflow A is bound to the capability tag B
Once I bind a capability tag B to a rebalance workflow A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unbind_capability_tag_from_workflow.description: unbind a capability tag B from a rebalance workflow A
preconditions: I can only unbind a capability tag B from a rebalance workflow A if it is the case that the workflow A is bound to the capability tag B
effects: Once I unbind a capability tag B from a rebalance workflow A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unbind a capability tag B from a rebalance workflow A, it is not the case anymore that the workflow A is bound to the capability tag B

promote_workflow_with_checks.description: promote a rebalance workflow A to a promotion stage B with a capacity profile C and a security control D
preconditions: I can only promote a rebalance workflow A to a promotion stage B with a capacity profile C and a security control D if it is the case that the workflow A has an allocation and the workflow A is bound to the capacity profile C and the workflow A is bound to the security control D and B is available and A is compatible with B
I can only promote a rebalance workflow A to a promotion stage B with a capacity profile C and a security control D if it is not the case that the stage of the workflow A is locked
effects: Once I promote a rebalance workflow A to a promotion stage B with a capacity profile C and a security control D, it is the case that the workflow A is assigned to the stage B and the stage of the workflow A is locked
Once I promote a rebalance workflow A to a promotion stage B with a capacity profile C and a security control D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

promote_workflow_with_compliance.description: promote a rebalance workflow A to a promotion stage B with a node group C and a compliance check D
preconditions: I can only promote a rebalance workflow A to a promotion stage B with a node group C and a compliance check D if it is the case that the workflow A has an allocation and the workflow A is bound to the node group C and D is available and B is available and A is compatible with B and A is compatible with D
I can only promote a rebalance workflow A to a promotion stage B with a node group C and a compliance check D if it is not the case that the stage of the workflow A is locked
effects: Once I promote a rebalance workflow A to a promotion stage B with a node group C and a compliance check D, it is the case that the workflow A is assigned to the stage B and the stage of the workflow A is locked and A requires a quota adjustment and workflow A requires manual approval

Once I promote a rebalance workflow A to a promotion stage B with a node group C and a compliance check D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available

clear_quota_adjustment_flag.description: clear quota adjustment flag for a rebalance workflow A with a capacity profile B and a security control C
preconditions: I can only clear quota adjustment flag for a rebalance workflow A with a capacity profile B and a security control C if it is the case that the stage of the workflow A is locked and A requires a quota adjustment and the workflow A is bound to the capacity profile B and the workflow A is bound to the security control C
effects: Once I clear quota adjustment flag for a rebalance workflow A with a capacity profile B and a security control C, it is not the case anymore that A requires a quota adjustment and it is not the case anymore that workflow A requires manual approval

request_finalization.description: request finalization for a rebalance workflow A with a capacity profile B, a security control C, and a quota class D
preconditions: I can only request finalization for a rebalance workflow A with a capacity profile B, a security control C, and a quota class D if it is the case that the workflow checks for A have passed and the stage of the workflow A is locked and the workflow A is bound to the capacity profile B and the workflow A is bound to the security control C and A has a quota reference D

I can only request finalization for a rebalance workflow A with a capacity profile B, a security control C, and a quota class D if it is not the case that workflow A requires manual approval and it is not the case that the workflow A is ready for finalization
effects: Once I request finalization for a rebalance workflow A with a capacity profile B, a security control C, and a quota class D, it is the case that the workflow A is ready for finalization

request_finalization_with_quota_instance.description: request finalization for a rebalance workflow A with a node group B, a capability tag C, and a quota instance D
preconditions: I can only request finalization for a rebalance workflow A with a node group B, a capability tag C, and a quota instance D if it is the case that the workflow checks for A have passed and the stage of the workflow A is locked and the workflow A is bound to the node group B and the workflow A is bound to the capability tag C and A has a quota reference D
I can only request finalization for a rebalance workflow A with a node group B, a capability tag C, and a quota instance D if it is not the case that the workflow A is ready for finalization
effects: Once I request finalization for a rebalance workflow A with a node group B, a capability tag C, and a quota instance D, it is the case that the workflow A is ready for finalization and workflow A requires manual approval

apply_finalization.description: apply finalization to a rebalance workflow A with a capacity profile B and a security control C
preconditions: I can only apply finalization to a rebalance workflow A with a capacity profile B and a security control C if it is the case that the workflow A is ready for finalization and workflow A requires manual approval and the workflow A is bound to the capacity profile B and the workflow A is bound to the security control C
effects: Once I apply finalization to a rebalance workflow A with a capacity profile B and a security control C, it is the case that workflow A is finalized

Once I apply finalization to a rebalance workflow A with a capacity profile B and a security control C, it is not the case anymore that workflow A requires manual approval and it is not the case anymore that the workflow checks for A have passed and it is not the case anymore that A requires a quota adjustment

reserve_pool_with_approver.description: reserve an agent pool B for a rebalance workflow A with approval from an approver C
preconditions: I can only reserve an agent pool B for a rebalance workflow A with approval from an approver C if it is the case that workflow A is finalized and the workflow A is ready for finalization and the workflow A has an allocation and A is bound to the agent pool B and C is available
I can only reserve an agent pool B for a rebalance workflow A with approval from an approver C if it is not the case that the workflow checks for A have passed
effects: Once I reserve an agent pool B for a rebalance workflow A with approval from an approver C, it is the case that the workflow checks for A have passed

confirm_pool_reservation.description: confirm reservation for a rebalance workflow A in an agent pool B
preconditions: I can only confirm reservation for a rebalance workflow A in an agent pool B if it is the case that the workflow A is ready for finalization and the workflow checks for A have passed and A is bound to the agent pool B

I can only confirm reservation for a rebalance workflow A in an agent pool B if it is not the case that workflow A requires manual approval and it is not the case that the reservation for workflow A is confirmed
effects: Once I confirm reservation for a rebalance workflow A in an agent pool B, it is the case that the reservation for workflow A is confirmed

confirm_credential_token.description: confirm a credential token B for a rebalance workflow A
preconditions: I can only confirm a credential token B for a rebalance workflow A if it is the case that the workflow A is ready for finalization and the workflow checks for A have passed and B is available

I can only confirm a credential token B for a rebalance workflow A if it is not the case that workflow A requires manual approval and it is not the case that the reservation for workflow A is confirmed
effects: Once I confirm a credential token B for a rebalance workflow A, it is the case that the reservation for workflow A is confirmed
Once I confirm a credential token B for a rebalance workflow A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

bind_artifact_to_workflow.description: bind a build artifact B to a rebalance workflow A
preconditions: I can only bind a build artifact B to a rebalance workflow A if it is the case that the reservation for workflow A is confirmed and B is available and A is delegating the workflow artifact B
effects: Once I bind a build artifact B to a rebalance workflow A, it is the case that A is compatible with the build artifact B
Once I bind a build artifact B to a rebalance workflow A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

governance_approve_artifact_for_rebalanc.description: approve a build artifact C for a rebalancer workflow B by a governance workflow A
preconditions: I can only approve a build artifact C for a rebalancer workflow B by a governance workflow A if it is the case that A is registered and A has governance attached and workflow A is bound to build artifact C and B is compatible with the build artifact C
I can only approve a build artifact C for a rebalancer workflow B by a governance workflow A if it is not the case that workflow A has approved build artifact C
effects: Once I approve a build artifact C for a rebalancer workflow B by a governance workflow A, it is the case that workflow A has approved build artifact C

record_operational_readiness.description: record operational readiness for a rebalance workflow A with an agent pool B approved by an approver C
preconditions: I can only record operational readiness for a rebalance workflow A with an agent pool B approved by an approver C if it is the case that A is registered and A has governance attached and the workflow checks for A have passed and the reservation for workflow A is confirmed and A is bound to the agent pool B and C is available
I can only record operational readiness for a rebalance workflow A with an agent pool B approved by an approver C if it is not the case that workflow A is ready for completion
effects: Once I record operational readiness for a rebalance workflow A with an agent pool B approved by an approver C, it is the case that workflow A is ready for completion

complete_workflow_if_eligible.description: complete a rebalance workflow A if eligible
preconditions: I can only complete a rebalance workflow A if eligible if it is the case that A is eligible for completion and A is registered and the workflow A has an allocation and the stage of the workflow A is locked and the workflow A is ready for finalization and the reservation for workflow A is confirmed and the workflow checks for A have passed
I can only complete a rebalance workflow A if eligible if it is not the case that workflow A is completed
effects: Once I complete a rebalance workflow A if eligible, it is the case that workflow A is completed

complete_workflow_with_artifact_approval.description: complete a rebalance workflow A with approved a build artifact B
preconditions: I can only complete a rebalance workflow A with approved a build artifact B if it is the case that A has governance attached and A is registered and the workflow A has an allocation and the stage of the workflow A is locked and the workflow A is ready for finalization and the reservation for workflow A is confirmed and the workflow checks for A have passed and workflow A has approved build artifact B
I can only complete a rebalance workflow A with approved a build artifact B if it is not the case that workflow A is completed
effects: Once I complete a rebalance workflow A with approved a build artifact B, it is the case that workflow A is completed

complete_workflow_with_operational_readi.description: complete a rebalance workflow A with operational readiness
preconditions: I can only complete a rebalance workflow A with operational readiness if it is the case that A has governance attached and A is registered and the workflow A has an allocation and the stage of the workflow A is locked and the workflow A is ready for finalization and the reservation for workflow A is confirmed and the workflow checks for A have passed and workflow A is ready for completion
I can only complete a rebalance workflow A with operational readiness if it is not the case that workflow A is completed
effects: Once I complete a rebalance workflow A with operational readiness, it is the case that workflow A is completed

action_nl_templates.bind_capability_tag_to_workflow: bind capability tag {?capability_tag} to rebalance workflow {?workflow}
action_nl_templates.unbind_capability_tag_from_workflow: unbind capability tag {?capability_tag} from rebalance workflow {?workflow}
action_nl_templates.promote_workflow_with_checks: promote rebalance workflow {?workflow} to promotion stage {?stage} with capacity profile {?capacity_profile} and security control {?security_control}
action_nl_templates.promote_workflow_with_compliance: promote rebalance workflow {?workflow} to promotion stage {?stage} with node group {?node_group} and compliance check {?compliance_check}
action_nl_templates.clear_quota_adjustment_flag: clear quota adjustment flag for rebalance workflow {?workflow} with capacity profile {?capacity_profile} and security control {?security_control}
action_nl_templates.request_finalization: request finalization for rebalance workflow {?workflow} with capacity profile {?capacity_profile}, security control {?security_control}, and quota class {?quota_class}
action_nl_templates.request_finalization_with_quota_instance: request finalization for rebalance workflow {?workflow} with node group {?node_group}, capability tag {?capability_tag}, and quota instance {?quota_instance}
action_nl_templates.apply_finalization: apply finalization to rebalance workflow {?workflow} with capacity profile {?capacity_profile} and security control {?security_control}
action_nl_templates.reserve_pool_with_approver: reserve agent pool {?agent_pool} for rebalance workflow {?workflow} with approval from approver {?approver}
action_nl_templates.confirm_pool_reservation: confirm reservation for rebalance workflow {?workflow} in agent pool {?agent_pool}
action_nl_templates.confirm_credential_token: confirm credential token {?credential_token} for rebalance workflow {?workflow}
action_nl_templates.bind_artifact_to_workflow: bind build artifact {?build_artifact} to rebalance workflow {?workflow}
action_nl_templates.governance_approve_artifact_for_rebalanc: approve build artifact {?build_artifact} for rebalancer workflow {?rebalancer} by governance workflow {?governance_agent}
action_nl_templates.record_operational_readiness: record operational readiness for rebalance workflow {?workflow} with agent pool {?agent_pool} approved by approver {?approver}
action_nl_templates.complete_workflow_with_artifact_approval: complete rebalance workflow {?workflow} with approved build artifact {?build_artifact}
action_nl_templates.complete_workflow_with_operational_readi: complete rebalance workflow {?workflow} with operational readiness

predicate_nl_templates.workflow_bound_capability_tag: the workflow {?workflow} is bound to the capability tag {?capability_tag}

predicate_nl_templates.workflow_reservation_confirmed: the reservation for workflow {?workflow} is confirmed

predicate_nl_templates.workflow_bound_pool: {?workflow} is bound to the agent pool {?agent_pool}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a rebalance workflow or a build agent or a promotion stage or a security control or a capacity profile or a node group or a agent pool or a credential token or a build artifact or a approver or a compliance check or a capability tag or a quota reference is also a object
Everything that is a quota class or a quota instance is also a quota reference
Everything that is a rebalancer workflow or a governance workflow is also a rebalance workflow
